{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170503A222F228D7A1865905CA"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611369546869244734","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"职场人感同身受，很解压，切入的角度很新颖，帝后合作，双赢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772162855,"group_id":"7609868509782215705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2NH4GbisrPljcs3YSXAyeLzgKXjlUs8rJSm20fc843r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4405093036732105","user_name":"爱吃米饭披萨的马基"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4405093036732105","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609868509782215705","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书】＋【宫斗】＋【职场】＋【反套路】＋【轻松搞笑】＋【甜宠】
庾晚音，当代社畜，加班猝死。
醒来发现穿进了宫斗小说，成了活不过三章的妖妃。
好消息：皇帝好像也是穿来的。
坏消息：他穿过来的时候才十五，是个初中生。
两人对视一眼，同时问出灵魂拷问：
“这破地方，怎么辞职？”
——辞职是不可能辞职的，这辈子都不可能。
那就……凑合过吧，还能离咋的？
用Excel管后宫，用KPI考核大臣，用PPT汇报政绩，用火锅宴拉拢人心。
端王要造反？先过HR这关。
太后要立威？客户难缠咱见得多。
选秀塞人？咱有裁员经验，要裁一起裁。
本想躺平任嘲，结果越卷越强。
一不小心，把整个王朝带上了巅峰。
五十年后，两人躺在摇椅上回顾这一生——
“你说咱俩，成何体统？”
“管他呢，开心就行。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/1476de0e64100e5ea0474f3245d96043~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"廿八书","author_id":"","book_id":"7609868509782215705","book_name":"成何体统：社畜夫妻治国记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1090人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609871315662553662","read_count":"1090","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"385741"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"149","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,异世穿越,今穿古,穿书,甜宠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1476de0e64100e5ea0474f3245d96043~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181503&x-signature=5L3o6zigEk6BDQanYRwK27cLnQ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"60412677521","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170503A222F228D7A1865905CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count"
